description_long: This object depicts a highly stylized adult human figure with exaggeratedly elongated limbs and torso, creating a surreal and distorted appearance. The figure is dressed in a short-sleeved top and knee-length shorts, with bare feet visible. The arms are stretched out to an extreme degree, with one arm extending far beyond the body and the hand loosely open. The head is small in proportion to the body, with hair styled in a short, tied-back fashion. The overall form is slender, with visible articulation at the joints, and the skin surface appears smooth and matte. The figure's posture is dynamic, as if caught in a moment of reaching or stretching, giving it a sense of motion and tension.
description: A surreal, elongated adult figure in casual clothing with extremely stretched limbs and a dynamic, reaching posture.
description_view_0: The figure is seen from the side, highlighting the extreme length of the right arm and the dynamic stretch of the body.
description_view_1: Viewed from the back, the elongated torso and arm are prominent, with the head and hair tie visible from behind.
description_view_2: From this angle, the left side of the body and the extended arm are visible, emphasizing the figure's unusual proportions.
description_view_3: A rear three-quarter view shows the back of the head, the bent legs, and the dramatic extension of the arm away from the body.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved top and knee-length shorts
attribute_posture: dynamically stretching with one arm extended far from the body
attribute_hairstyle: short hair tied back in a small ponytail
